title: Society Fellowships and Other Honors — Seminar Slides (Kamangar)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2024-02-29 New Faculty Development Seminar 'Society Fellowships and Other Honors' presented by Farin Kamangar, MD, PhD. Lead deck of a three-deck multi-presenter panel; companion decks are Christine Hohmann's 'Road to Elected Fellowships: AAAS and IBNS' and Megan DeVirgilis's 'Fulbright Scholar Opportunities'. Panel also included Oscar Barton, Jr., PE, PhD (Dean, School of Engineering). Recording on zoom.us (not morganstate.zoom.us).
